mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE IS_DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY NO DESC
SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE NO = #{no} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET HIT = HIT + 1 WHERE NO = #{no} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NO, MEMBER_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, HIT, REGDATE, IS_DELETED ) VALUES ( NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE NO = #{no} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
UPDATE NOTICE SET IS_DELETED = 'Y' WHERE NO = #{no} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
